tools.name: list_plans

Credit packs stack on any plan, including Free. Use this when a user asks how to buy more AI cred

tools.name: free_tier_eligibility

tools.name: list_integrations
tools.description: List integrations (banks, payments, payroll, time tracking, shipping, accounting sync, ecommerce, CRM).

tools.name: country_support
tools.description: Return features available per supported country (AU, IN, UK, US, CA, AE, SG, NZ).

tools.name: compliance_capabilities

Queries like "vs Xero", "QuickBooks alternative", "GSTR-3B due", "

tools.name: list_competitors
tools.description: Return competitor positioning entries (QuickBooks, Xero, FreshBooks, Wave, Zoho Books, Tally) with where HelloBooks wins, where the competitor wins, and pricing notes. Optional country, tier (primary / secondary), and id filters.

tools.name: compliance_deadlines
tools.description: When statutory returns and payroll filings are due, per country. Covers IN (GSTR-1/3B/9/9C, CMP-08, Form 24Q, Form 16, PF ECR, ESI), AU (BAS, STP, Super Guarantee), GB (VAT MTD, RTI, Self Assessment), US (1099-NEC/MISC, W-2, Form 941/940), CA (T4, GST/HST). Optional country, frequency, and form filt

tools.name: local_payment_methods
tools.description: List local bank-rail / wallet payment methods relevant to HelloBooks invoice collection (AR), B2B supplier payments (AP), and contractor payouts (UPI, RuPay, Razorpay, IMPS, NEFT, RTGS, BACS, FPS, CHAPS, Open Banking, Interac e-Transfer, EFT, PayID, PayTo, NPP, BPAY, ACH, Same Day ACH, Fedwire, RTP,

tools.name: list_features
tools.description: List the full HelloBooks marketing feature catalog (145+ items). Filter by category, tier, status, marketedOnly, or substring query.

tools.name: list_feature_categories
tools.description: List the 13 feature categories on the marketing site (Core Accounting, Invoicing, Banking, Reports, Tax & Compliance, Inventory, Warehouse, Manufacturing, AI, Integrations, Mobile, Operations, Industry Modules) with per-category counts by status.

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: List published articles on hellobooks.ai — head-to-head compare pages and curated flagship blog posts. Filter by country, tag or free-text query. Use this when a user asks "do you have a blog/article about X?".

tools.name: list_videos
tools.description: List HelloBooks product videos curated on the marketing site (homepage demo + feature walkthroughs) and the official @hellobooksai YouTube channel link. Each video returns title, description, category, watch URL, embed URL and thumbnail. Filter by category (demo / features / overview), featuredOnly,

tools.name: analyze_qbo_journal_cleanup
tools.description: Scan a QuickBooks Online "Journal Entries" CSV export for cleanup issues — unbalanced journals (debits ≠ credits, with severity by deviation), duplicate journals (same date + same totals, likely posted twice), and schema problems (invalid dates, malformed amounts, missing accounts, missing journal n

tools.name: analyze_qbo_journal_anomalies
tools.description: Scan a QuickBooks Online "Journal Entries" CSV export for anomalies — currently round-number lines (debit or credit amounts that are exact multiples of $1,000, above a $1,000 materiality threshold). Round numbers are statistically rare in real bookkeeping and frequently indicate estimates, plugs, or

tools.name: analyze_xero_journal_cleanup
tools.description: Scan a Xero "Manual Journals" CSV export for cleanup issues — unbalanced journals, duplicate journals (same date + same totals), and schema problems (invalid dates, malformed amounts, missing account code/name, missing group key). Input is the raw CSV content the user pastes after exporting from Xer

tools.name: analyze_xero_journal_anomalies
tools.description: Scan a Xero "Manual Journals" CSV export for anomalies — currently round-number lines (debit or credit amounts that are exact multiples of $1,000, above a $1,000 materiality threshold). Input is raw CSV text from Xero Accounting → Advanced → Manual Journals → Export. Max 5,000 rows; max 5 MB. Return

tools.name: analyze_journal_variance
tools.description: Compare two periods of journal-entry data (QBO or Xero — source auto-detected from headers) and flag accounts whose movement deviates materially between periods. tools.description: Take a Profit & Loss / Income Statement CSV export from QuickBooks Online, Xero, Zoho Books, or Wave (source auto-detected from section names) and run three checks: (1) pnl.subtotal_mismatch — each "Total Section" subtotal equals the sum of its preceding line items (catches missing or duplicated row

tools.name: analyze_balance_sheet
tools.description: Take a Balance Sheet CSV export from QuickBooks Online, Xero, Zoho Books, or Wave (source auto-detected) and run three checks: (1) bs.equation_broken — the fundamental accounting equation Assets = Liabilities + Equity does not hold (every downstream ratio analysis is invalid until fixed); (2) bs.neg

tools.name: list_tax_rates
tools.description: List statutory tax-rate slabs by jurisdiction — IN GST (5/12/18/28 + zero + exempt + composition trader/manufacturer/restaurant + compensation cess), UK VAT (20 / 5 / zero / exempt), AU GST (10 / GST-free), US sales-tax (state-administered summary, no federal rate), CA GST 5% + HST 13% ON / 15% Atla

tools.name: lookup_tax_rate
tools.description: Pick a single statutory tax-rate slab — either by exact `id` (e.g. `IN-standard-18`, `GB-zero-0`, `CA-hst-13-on`) for a deterministic lookup, or by `country` + free-text `category` (e.g. "office supplies", "restaurant", "exports", "domestic fuel") for a fuzzy best-match. Returns the matched rate, th

tools.name: analyze_trial_balance
tools.description: Take a Trial Balance CSV export from QuickBooks Online, Xero, Zoho Books, or Wave (source auto-detected from headers — YTD columns indicate Xero, Opening Balance indicates Zoho, etc.) and run three checks: (1) tb.unbalanced — debits ≠ credits (every downstream P&L / BS / cash-flow report built from

tools.name: how_munimji_helps
tools.description: Explain how HelloBooks and Munimji (the in-app AI assistant) help a specific business — given a free-text description of the user's own operations. Returns a curated capability knowledge base: business-operation areas (sales, purchases, banking, tax, reports, inventory, payroll, multi-entity, setup)

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_plans, free_tier_eligibility, list_articles, list_videos, analyze_qbo_journal_cleanup, analyze_xero_journal_cleanup, analyze_journal_variance, analyze_balance_sheet, list_tax_rates · Private data: local_payment_methods, estimate_migration_effort, analyze_trial_balance · Public sink: list_videos, compare_books_to_hellobooks · Destructive: compare_books_to_hellobooks, analyze_profit_loss, analyze_balance_sheet, analyze_trial_balance, how_munimji_helps.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_plans, free_tier_eligibility, list_articles, list_videos, analyze_qbo_journal_cleanup, analyze_xero_journal_cleanup, analyze_journal_variance, analyze_balance_sheet, list_tax_rates · Private data: local_payment_methods, estimate_migration_effort, analyze_trial_balance · Public sink: list_videos, compare_books_to_hellobooks · Destructive: compare_books_to_hellobooks, analyze_profit_loss, analyze_balance_sheet, analyze_trial_balance, how_munimji_helps

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
